primary_products: Genasys Protect + Acoustics (backup reach when networks fail)

outcome_owner.title: The Outcome Owner (Strategic / Political)

personal_value: Securing public confidence by preventing tragedies (e.g., the Maui fires)

problem_owner.title: The Problem Owner (Operational / Tactical)

Precision evacuations — don't under- or over-evacuate
challenges: Latency in critical moments (hours vs. minutes)
personal_value: Being the 'go-to' expert who manages chaos with the best tools
Moving from 'grease pencils on maps' to automated digital solutions
Addressing a known preparedness gap
questions: From first responder arrival to alerting the public — walk me through your current process.
How long does it take to define an evacuation perimeter and communicate it to the public?
What's your backup if cellular fails?

objectives: Force readiness & safety of all personnel/assets
Escalation of Force (EOF) protocols — non-lethal options before lethal engagement
Base resiliency for continuity of operations
challenges: Synchronizing data between BDOC and EOC
Budget competition against lethal weapons programs
personal_value: Being the Commander who modernized the installation (Smart Base) — directly impacts General/Flag promotion
Ensuring every warning was issued before a lethal engagement or disaster
questions: If you had to prove to an oversight committee that you exhausted non-lethal options before lethal engagement, does your current system provide that audit trail?

problem_owner.title: The Problem Owner (Operational / Tactical)
objectives: Intelligibility & range — clear verbal commands over loud background noise
Targeted zone lockdown without alerting entire installation
challenges: Bridging BDOC and EOC communication gaps
Poor reliability of legacy Giant Voice systems
Determining intent of approaching vessel, vehicle, or drone swarm at distance
personal_value: Recognition as SME who reduced response times
Securing a wider perimeter with fewer personnel using acoustic hailing devices
Confidence the system works when the button is pushed
questions: When a vehicle approaches your exclusion zone, at what distance can you communicate verbal warnings to determine intent?
Can you target specific buildings for lockdown without stopping the entire installation's mission?
